content_chunks.title: Professional Background
content_chunks.content: I am a Senior Software Engineer based in Melbourne, Australia with 5+ years of experience building scalable applications. I'm passionate about designing robust systems and driving technical excellence. My expertise spans full-stack development, cloud architecture, and AI/ML integration.

content_chunks.title: Contact Information
content_chunks.content: Email: your.email@example.com | LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/yourprofile | GitHub: https://github.com/yourusername | Portfolio: https://yourportfolio.com

content_chunks.title: Current Role - Senior Software Engineer
content_chunks.content: Senior Software Engineer at TechCorp Australia (Jan 2021 - Present, 3.5 years). Leading architectural initiatives in a 200+ employee fintech startup. Direct reports: 3 junior developers. Managed $300K annual infrastructure budget. Led microservices migration reducing load times by 40% and saving $50K annually in server costs.

content_chunks.title: Technical Skills - Programming Languages
content_chunks.content: Expert-level proficiency in Python (5 years, frameworks: Django, FastAPI, Flask). Advanced JavaScript (4 years, React, Node.js, TypeScript). Databases: PostgreSQL (5 years), MongoDB (3 years), Redis (2 years). Cloud platforms: AWS (4 years), Docker (3 years), Kubernetes (2 years).

content_chunks.title: AI/ML & Modern Technologies
content_chunks.content: Specialized in RAG systems implementation, vector databases, and LLM integration. Experienced with OpenAI API, Groq, and modern AI frameworks. Currently developing AI-powered applications and digital twin systems. Strong knowledge of prompt engineering and vector search optimization.

content_chunks.title: Soft Skills & Leadership
content_chunks.content: Technical Leadership, Cross-functional Collaboration, Mentoring junior developers, Problem-solving, Agile/Scrum methodologies. Strong ability to communicate complex technical concepts, lead code reviews, and coordinate across product and design teams.

content_chunks.title: Education
content_chunks.content: Bachelor of Computer Science from University of Melbourne (2019). High Distinction GPA: 3.7/4.0. Relevant coursework: Data Structures, Algorithms, Database Systems, Machine Learning. Thesis project: Predictive Analytics for E-commerce Recommendations.

content_chunks.title: Professional Certifications
content_chunks.content: AWS Solutions Architect Certified (expires 2025). Certified Scrum Master (2023). Currently pursuing Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA). Strong credentials in cloud architecture and agile methodologies.

content_chunks.title: Portfolio Project - AI-Powered Digital Twin Workshop
content_chunks.content: End-to-end RAG system for interview preparation and professional development. Technologies: Python, Upstash Vector, Groq API, Next.js. Helped 100+ professionals improve interview performance. Live demo: https://mydigitaltwin.vercel.app. GitHub: https://github.com/username/digital-twin.

content_chunks.title: Career Goals
content_chunks.content: Short-term goal: Lead technical architect role with AI/ML focus. Long-term: Head of Engineering at AI-first company. Focused learning areas: Advanced AI/ML systems, Large-scale system architecture, Team leadership. Industries of interest: Fintech, AI/ML, Enterprise SaaS.

content_chunks.title: System Architecture & Microservices
content_chunks.content: Deep expertise in designing and implementing microservices architecture. Experienced with containerization, orchestration, and distributed systems. Successfully led architectural redesigns improving performance by 40% and reducing infrastructure costs significantly. Strong understanding of scalability, reliability, and deployment patterns.

content_chunks.title: Development Methodologies
content_chunks.content: Agile/Scrum practitioner with experience in sprint planning, retrospectives, and continuous improvement. Strong code review practices and mentoring approach. Experience with CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and DevOps practices. Advocate for clean code and architectural excellence.
